 "data": "sequenceDiagram\n autonumber\n box lightYellow\n participant Bank\n end\n\n box lightGreen\n participant Customer\n end\n\n box rgb(219,99,214)\n participant VNPT Business Layer as VNPT Lending Platform\n end\n box rgb(153,238,251) The Sherpa Private Cluster\n participant TS API\n participant SMS Gateway\n participant Campaign Manager\n participant Qualification Engine\n end\n Campaign Manager ->> SMS Gateway: Send Advertising SMSes\n activate SMS Gateway\n SMS Gateway ->> VNPT Business Layer: Send Advertising SMS using Hashed MSISDN\n deactivate SMS Gateway\n activate VNPT Business Layer\n VNPT Business Layer ->> VNPT Business Layer: Convert Hashed MSISDN Naked MSISDN\n VNPT Business Layer ->>+ Customer: Send Advertising SMSes\n Customer ->>- VNPT Business Layer: Acceptance SMS\n VNPT Business Layer ->> VNPT Business Layer: Convert Naked MSISDN to Hashed MSISDN\n VNPT Business Layer ->> SMS Gateway: Forward Acceptance SMSes\n deactivate VNPT Business Layer\n activate SMS Gateway\n SMS Gateway ->> Qualification Engine: Forward Acceptance SMSes\n deactivate SMS Gateway\n activate Qualification Engine\n Qualification Engine ->> TS API: Generate Qualified Leads\n deactivate Qualification Engine\n activate TS API\n TS API ->> VNPT Business Layer: Push Leads with Hashed MSISDN<br> (credit_score, location, telco_unique_token, lead_info,...)\n deactivate TS API\n activate VNPT Business Layer\n VNPT Business Layer ->>+ Bank: Push Leads with Naked MSISDN\n deactivate VNPT Business Layer\n Bank ->>+ VNPT Business Layer: Accept/Reject leads\n activate VNPT Business Layer\n VNPT Business Layer ->>+ TS API: Accept/Reject leads\n deactivate VNPT Business Layer\n activate TS API\n TS API ->>+ Qualification Engine: Accept/Reject leads\n deactivate TS API\n\n alt Rejected Lead\n Qualification Engine ->> Qualification Engine: Update status\n end\n\n activate Qualification Engine\n Qualification Engine ->>+ SMS Gateway: Interacting SMS <br> (SMS with DOP link onboarding: https://<domain>/offer/esms)\n deactivate Qualification Engine\n activate SMS Gateway\n SMS Gateway ->>+ VNPT Business Layer: Sending Interacting SMS\n deactivate SMS Gateway\n VNPT Business Layer ->>+ Customer: Sending Interacting SMS\n deactivate VNPT Business Layer\n Customer ->>+ Bank: Onboarding\n Bank ->>+ VNPT Business Layer: Query Fraud Score\n VNPT Business Layer ->> VNPT Business Layer: Convert Naked MSISDN to Hashed MSISDN\n VNPT Business Layer ->>+ TS API: Check Fraud Score with Hashed MSISDN\n TS API->>- VNPT Business Layer: Fraud Score\n VNPT Business Layer ->> Bank: Fraud Score\n deactivate VNPT Business Layer\n deactivate Bank"
